title: Apple’s New Siri AI Is Now Gemini
summary: Apple unveiled a rebuilt Siri AI at WWDC 2026 with personal context, screen awareness, and Visual Intelligence, powered by Google Gemini. Despite the upgrade, investor reaction was negative with Apple shares falling, and EU regulatory delays complicate the rollout. The piece questions whether Apple is advancing AI capabilities or merely repackaging competitor technology.
writeup: The video covers Apple's WWDC 2026 reveal of a rebuilt Siri that adds personal context, screen awareness, and Visual Intelligence, with Google Gemini supplying the underlying model. It matters because a flagship consumer assistant running on a competitor's AI raises questions about whether Apple is genuinely advancing its own capabilities or repackaging external technology. Key takeaways: investor reaction was negative and Apple shares fell despite the upgrade, and EU regulatory delays complicate the rollout.
